_meta.tier2_keys: Machine translation acceptable as first draft.

common.error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

auth.login_subtitle: Use OTP login to access your GigGuard dashboard and buy policy flow.
auth.enter_otp: Enter the 6-digit code sent to your phone.
auth.otp_helper: We'll send a 6-digit OTP to this number
auth.login_error_network: Could not connect. Check your internet and try again.
auth.login_error_not_found: No worker account found for this number. Register first.
auth.otp_sent_to: We sent a 6-digit code to this number

onboarding.title: Join GigGuard
onboarding.subtitle: Get income protection for your delivery work
onboarding.create_subtitle: Register once and activate weekly protection when you buy your first policy.
onboarding.platform_label: Which platform do you work for?
onboarding.earnings_help: Used to calculate your payout amount
onboarding.upi_help: Used for automatic payouts when triggered
onboarding.language_subtitle: GigGuard will show claim updates and notifications in this language
onboarding.language_change_later: You can change this later in your profile
onboarding.success_body: Your account is ready. Buy your first weekly policy now.
onboarding.error_earning: Daily earning should be between 200 and 5000.
onboarding.error_upi: UPI VPA must contain exactly one @ symbol.

dashboard.no_policy_body: You are not covered this week.

buy_policy.title: Buy Weekly Policy
buy_policy.subtitle: Choose the coverage that's right for you
buy_policy.payment_success_body: You are covered from {start} to {end}. We will pay you automatically if a trigger fires.
buy_policy.payment_failed_body: Your payment could not be processed. No amount was charged. Please try again.
buy_policy.already_has_policy: You already have an active policy this week.

claims.title: My Claims
claims.empty_body: When a trigger fires in your area, your claim will appear here.

claim_detail.title: Claim Details
claim_detail.event_description_rain: Heavy rainfall of {value}mm/hr was recorded near your location on {date}.
claim_detail.event_description_aqi: Air quality reached a hazardous AQI of {value} in your city on {date}.
claim_detail.event_description_heat: Temperature felt like {value}°C in your area on {date}.
claim_detail.event_description_flood: A flood or red alert was active in your area on {date}.
claim_detail.event_description_curfew: A curfew or city-wide strike was declared in your area on {date}.
claim_detail.approved_message: Your claim has been approved. ₹{amount} is being transferred to your UPI address. This usually takes a few minutes.
claim_detail.paid_message: ₹{amount} was transferred to {upi} on {date}. If you have not received it, contact your bank.
claim_detail.under_review_message: Your claim is being verified. This is a routine check that takes up to 4 hours. You will receive a notification when it is complete. No action is needed from you.
claim_detail.flagged_message: Your claim has been flagged for a detailed review by our team. A GigGuard representative will contact you within 4 hours. Please keep your phone available.
claim_detail.denied_message: We were unable to verify this claim. If you believe this is an error, please use the appeal button below. A human reviewer will look at your case within 2 hours.
claim_detail.appeal_confirm_body: Submitting an appeal sends your claim to a human reviewer. You will be contacted within 2 hours.
claim_detail.appeal_submitted: Your appeal has been submitted. We will contact you shortly.
claim_detail.flag_cell_tower_mismatch: We could not confirm your location at the time of the event.
claim_detail.flag_platform_offline: Your delivery app showed you as offline when the event occurred.
claim_detail.flag_policy_new: Your policy was activated very recently.
claim_detail.flag_claim_burst: An unusual number of claims were filed from your area at the same time.
claim_detail.flag_generic: A routine check is in progress.

profile.title: My Profile
profile.language_saved: Language updated. The app will reload.

notifications.policy_purchased_body: You are covered until {end_date}. Stay safe!
notifications.trigger_fired_body: A {trigger_type} was detected in your area. ₹{amount} is being sent to your UPI.
notifications.claim_approved_body: ₹{amount} has been approved for your {trigger_type} claim.
notifications.claim_paid_body: ₹{amount} was transferred to your UPI account.
notifications.claim_under_review_body: Your claim is being checked. No action needed. We will update you soon.
notifications.claim_denied_body: We could not verify your recent claim. Tap to learn more or appeal.

errors.network: No internet connection. Please check your network.
errors.session_expired: Your session has expired. Please log in again.
errors.unauthorized: You do not have permission to view this page.
errors.not_found: This page could not be found.
errors.payment_failed: Payment failed. No amount was charged.
errors.already_purchased: You already have an active policy for this week.
